subcodes.first_line: O gracious and fresh branch of the Blessed Tree! The responses to your communications will, God willing, be sent by post [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع النجیب الرطیب من السدره المبارکه جواب مراسلات آنحضرت انشاء الله در پوسته
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
